workflow_name: View Table Rows via DB2 System Catalog

steps.description: Type option 1 to select DB2 system catalog on the DB2 Admin main menu
Press Enter to navigate to the System Catalog Objects screen
Type option D to select Databases on the System Catalog Objects screen
Type the database name search pattern in the Name filter field on the System Catalog Objects screen
Press Enter to submit the filter and display the Databases list
Type line command T in the Select field next to the target database to view its tables
Press Enter to navigate to the Tables, Views, and Aliases list for the selected database
Type line command L in the Sel field next to the target table to list its rows
Press Enter to display the rows of the selected table
Press PF11 to scroll right and view additional columns
Press PF10 to scroll left and return to the first set of columns
Press PF8 to scroll down to the next page of rows
Press PF7 to scroll up to the previous page of rows
Press PF3 to exit the row list and return to the Tables list
Press PF3 to exit the Tables list and return to the Databases list
Press PF3 to exit the Databases list and return to the System Catalog Objects screen
Press PF3 to exit the System Catalog Objects screen and return to the DB2 Admin main menu
